qualitative_themes.label: Production systems

qualitative_themes.statement: A meaningful segment combines technical delivery with product or commercial scope

qualitative_themes.statement: The illustrative cohort includes a visible layer of technical leaders and senior operators

qualitative_themes.label: Rare distinction
qualitative_themes.statement: A distinctive achievement exists but is withheld because the group is too small
